_comment: Phase 20 placeholder baseline for simd_kernels.rs. Populated via `cargo bench -p tinyquant-bench --features simd --bench simd_kernels`. Criterion writes per-benchmark timings under target/criterion/ when runs happen on dedicated hardware; this file records the 'framework-first' baseline established when AVX2/NEON wrappers delegate to scalar. Phase 22 intrinsic work updates these numbers.
